title: Conformance Test Fixture Metadata
description: Metadata for a single conformance test fixture

contract_type.description: Contract type name matching Protocol.ContractType enum

contract_type_num.description: Numeric value of the contract type

case_name.description: Snake_case name for this test case

description.description: Human-readable description of what this test case verifies

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when fixture was generated

generator_version.description: Semantic version of the fixture generator

block_number.description: Block number used in execution context

block_timestamp.description: Block timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

databases_touched.description: List of database names that are read or written by this test

expected_error_message.description: Expected error message substring (for failure cases)

owner_address.description: Hex-encoded owner address (21 bytes with 0x41 prefix)

dynamic_properties.description: Key dynamic properties set for this test

strictDynamicProperties.description: When true, the runner enables strict_dynamic_properties so missing keys cause errors

strictExpectedFailure.description: When true, marks this fixture as an expected-failure case under strict dynamic-property mode. Post-state is compared to pre-state instead of expected post-state.

accountinfoAextMode.description: Override for accountinfo_aext_mode in the conformance runner

notes.description: Additional notes or known issues with this test case
